lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes but no major damage. The interior is clean with light wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are functioning properly and regular maintenance has been performed.
Fair condition.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches and the interior shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are functioning perfectly and the vehicle has been meticulously maintained.

Looking for a reliable ride at a great value? This vehicle is a fantastic choice for anyone who prioritizes performance over perfection! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years of faithful service, it still runs strong and is ready for its next adventure. It's a solid, dependable car that gets the job done with plenty of life left in it!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows visible signs of regular use and aging. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a small dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin shows wear on the seats and carpet, though all essential electronics remain functional. While the car starts and drives reliably for daily commutes, it would benefit from a tune-up and some minor suspension work to improve ride quality. It is a practical option for a buyer seeking a budget-friendly, functional vehicle that needs a little TLC.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a light surface scratch near the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; the upholstery shows very little wear, and all electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is sound, with a consistent service history and no known issues. A buyer can expect a reliable, attractive vehicle that is ready for daily use without needing immediate repairs.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, this model offers a seamless blend of performance and comfort. The interior remains in superior condition, reflecting a history of careful ownership. Experience the assurance of a vehicle that has been serviced to exacting standards, ready for immediate delivery.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of over the years. This car is perfect for someone looking for a dependable, clean vehicle that still looks great on the road. I've loved every mile in it, but it's time for someone else to enjoy it! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW's high-revving S54 inline-six heritage. The powerplant features individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system, delivering a linear torque curve and an 8,000-RPM redline. Power is sent through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis has been enhanced with Bilstein B16 dampers and reinforced subframe mounting points to mitigate common torsional stress issues. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the drivetrain remains robust, benefiting from a recent valve adjustment and cooling system overhaul. It offers an authentic,
Used vehicle in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of luxury and performance. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, you'll find a smoke-free cabin with supple leather upholstery, dual-zone climate control, and a premium sound system that functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is solid; it has been serviced regularly at scheduled intervals, ensuring the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a new set of high-performance all-season tires. It’s a reliable, stylish driver that has many miles of enjoyment left to offer for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior blend of performance and sophisticated styling. It stands as a testament to diligent ownership, exhibiting commendable mechanical integrity and a refined interior. This represents an exceptional opportunity for the professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring a smooth and responsive driving experience. With a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, it offers a sophisticated balance of utility and style. An ideal acquisition for the discerning buyer prioritizing consistent performance and long-term value.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been amazing. She’s in great shape and has plenty of life left in her! I’ve taken really good care of the interior and kept up with maintenance, so you’re getting a solid, reliable car that’s ready for your next road trip. I’d love for her to go to someone who will enjoy her as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 represents a mechanically sorted example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features a high-revving valvetrain and individual throttle bodies, delivering crisp throttle response. Power is managed via a 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains taut thanks to recent cooling system overhauls and inspected subframe mounting points. While showing minor signs of use appropriate for its mileage, the engine compression is strong and the VANOS system operates within factory tolerances. This is a driver-focused specimen optimized for performance and mechanical longevity.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs smooth.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, high-performing daily driver. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though minor stone chips on the front fascia reflect its honest road history. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and well-preserved, featuring supple leather seats with only light bolster wear on the driver’s side. Mechanically, it is sound; the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the engine pulls strong with no leaks or unusual noises. All electronic components, including the premium audio system and dual-zone climate control, function perfectly. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change, new brake pads, and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. It comes with a complete service history, two sets of keys, and tires with plenty of tread remaining, offering a smooth and confident ride.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation. Ideal for the discerning driver who prioritizes reliability and sophisticated engineering, this vehicle stands as a testament to diligent ownership. Experience the assurance of quality at a competitive market valuation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive professional assessment, it presents in commendable condition, ensuring a premium experience for the discerning motorist. A definitive choice for those seeking high-caliber engineering and lasting value.

It’s well-loved and runs like a dream, with just the usual minor wear you’d expect from a car that’s seen some fun adventures. If you’re looking for a great, dependable vehicle that’s ready to hit the road today, this is the one for you. Come check it out!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. Recent service includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement—critical preventative maintenance for this chassis. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts crisply, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. While showing minor patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity remains high with a focus on throttle response and chassis rigidity. Suspension remains tight with refreshed bushings and dampers, ensuring the iconic handling characteristics remain intact.
Used car in good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of premium performance and long-term reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road wear consistent with careful, everyday use. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, non-smoker environment where the leather upholstery remains supple and every electronic feature—from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car has been fastidiously maintained with a consistent service history, ensuring the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil service and a thorough multi-point inspection to ensure road-readiness. With plenty of tread remaining on the tires and a clean title in hand, this car is ready for its next owner to enjoy a high-end driving experience at an exceptional value.
